title: Automation: Need to block Item when status changes to Closed
excerpt: As the tile says, I have a board where the employees can see only the task assigned. I need an automation to block the item from the employee when the status changes to ‘Closed’. Thanks

posts.author: FernandoL (FerL)
posts.cookedHtml: As the tile says, I have a board where the employees can see only the task assigned. I need an automation to block the item from the employee when the status changes to ‘Closed’. Thanks

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
What about an automation when the status is change to ‘done’ that it removes the assigned person?

image1279×720 17.3 KB

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Clover_Gal,
I suggest you check out a marketplace app named Workflow. It allow setting permissions per status of an item.

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml: When you say ‘block’ them from the item, what are you trying to achieve?
